sourceStatus.detail: The scheduled GitHub Action will load the latest public observations.
The scheduled GitHub Action will load the annual compressed files and calculate positioning percentiles.

methodology.rates: Latest non-missing public FRED observations. Basis-point changes compare with the previous available observation.
methodology.cot: CFTC futures-only reports. Commodities use Managed Money; currencies and Treasury futures use Leveraged Funds. Percentiles use up to 260 weekly observations.
methodology.warning: COT reflects Tuesday positions normally released Friday. It is positioning context, not a real-time signal or proof of trader intent.
